title: Kleeneze KL070499FS Sock Airer – Hang On The Line Clothes Drying Rack, 20 Peg Clips, Oval Hanger For Small Items, Underwear & Socks, Use Indoor & Outdoor, Space Saving Design, Lightweight
features: Made from durable plastic this airer is suitable for drying, socks, underwear, small garments and delicate items. It can also be used both indoors and outdoors.
With 20 pegs attached,they are easy to open and have a strong grip perfect for windy days so your laundry won’t fly away.
Ideal for keeping out on the line, this drying rack has a hanging hook and saves much-needed line space for towels, bed linen and clothing.
With a lightweight and portable design, this drying rack can easily fit into your luggage, perfect for use when travelling and camping.
This drying rack is perfect for homes with limited storage space. It can be hung on your airer, shower rail or balcony.
description: Product Description Staying Houseproud For 100 Years Since 1923 A brand with a long history, Kleeneze began in 1923 as a door-to-door distributor of high-quality handmade wire brushes. Since then, the brand has developed into a well-known and highly regarded name, still concentrating on producing the products that people love, with a focus on innovative and great-value items. The ranges provide solutions to everyday chores by combining household staples with clever designs and forward-thinking ideas. Kleeneze Home Essentials Kleeneze began as a door-to-door distributor of high-quality handmade wire brushes. Since then, the brand has developed into a highly regarded name, providing a wide range of essential products teamed with clever designs that are perfect for every laundry, cleaning and home needs.
